sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2352" key="ai)qroplanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθρο-πλᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n2352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wandering in ether</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀστήρ</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a planet</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:586" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">586</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
